title: NZ Holiday Parks — The Complete Family Guide (TOP 10 vs Freedom Camping)
meta_desc: Discover the best NZ holiday parks and freedom camping options for your family trip, with prices and tips
intro: When planning a family trip around New Zealand, choosing the right accommodation can be overwhelming, especially with the numerous holiday parks and freedom camping options available. With prices ranging from $20 to $50 per night for a family of four, it's essential to weigh the pros and cons of each option. In this guide, we'll explore the TOP 10 holiday parks, freedom camping, and provide you with the best tips and tricks to make the most of your family adventure.

sections.heading: TOP 10 Holiday Parks vs Freedom Camping
sections.body: TOP 10 holiday parks offer a range of facilities, including swimming pools, playgrounds, and BBQ areas, making them an attractive option for families. However, freedom camping can be a more budget-friendly and flexible alternative, with many scenic spots available around the country. A night at a TOP 10 holiday park can cost between $40 to $60, while freedom camping can be as low as $10 to $20 per night.

sections.heading: Booking Tips and Tricks
sections.body: To ensure availability, especially during peak season, book your holiday park or campsite well in advance. Many TOP 10 holiday parks offer discounts for long-term stays or membership programs, so it's worth exploring these options. Additionally, consider visiting during the shoulder season (April to May or September to November) for lower prices and fewer crowds.

sections.heading: Best Holiday Parks by Region
list: North Island: Bay of Islands Holiday Park, Taupo Holiday Resort
South Island: Queenstown Lakeview Holiday Park, Wanaka Kiwi Holiday Park

sections.heading: Drive Times and Distances
sections.body: When planning your itinerary, consider the drive times and distances between destinations. For example, driving from Auckland to Rotorua takes around 3 hours, while driving from Queenstown to Milford Sound takes around 4 hours. Be sure to check the road conditions and weather forecast before embarking on your journey.

sections.heading: Plan Your Family Trip with Our Tools

cta.text: Use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator
